fields.title: agent: worker sandbox not inheriting/clamping parent restrictions
fields.description: Worker agents bypass tau's sandbox enforcement entirely. Workers use createAgentSession() which doesn't load extensions. The sandbox config is computed and stored but not enforced. Proper fix requires either: (1) loading tau extension in workers, (2) providing sandboxed tool wrappers to workers, or (3) hooking into worker session tool execution. This is a security issue for production use.
